productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Bolt White Sports Shoes
description: adidas have named this achingly cool looking sneaker after Usain Bolt, the fastest man on earth. Perhaps we can also capture his sucess by wearing these adidas Bolt shoes when we head out for our early morning jog! Even if you're more interested in posing as an athlete than actually hitting the road, these white, black and red sports shoes have more than a touch of fashionable style and will look pretty darn good paired up with a cool, casual, outfit.UpperMesh upper with synthetic leather overlays to give structure and support your footLace-up system for a customised FitPadded, mesh collar and tongue for comfortLightly padded insoleMidsoleChunky foam midsole which gives cushioning and support as well as looking great!OutsoleHardwearing outsole with shaped lugs for good gripshoe careUse a moist cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not clean the shoe in a washing machine
